
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(BerkeleyForestsAnalytics)
```

```{r}
ca_tree <- read_csv("CA_TREE.csv") 
ca_cond <- read_csv("CA_COND.csv") 
ca_plotsnap <- read_csv("CA_PLOTSNAP.csv") 
```

tree_with_stdorg <- tree %>%
  left_join(
    cond %>%
      select(STATECD, UNITCD, COUNTYCD, PLOT, INVYR, CONDID, STDORGCD),
    by = c("STATECD",
           "UNITCD",
           "COUNTYCD",
           "PLOT",
           "INVYR",
           "CONDID")
  )


```{r}
ca_tree_filter <- ca_tree %>%
  filter(INVYR == 2021,
         STATUSCD == 1 | STATUSCD == 2) %>%
  mutate(site = as.character(STATECD),
         plot = as.character(PLOT),
         exp_factor = 50,
         status = as.character(STATUSCD),
         decay_class = as.character(DECAYCD),
         species = as.character(SPCD),
         dbh = DIA,
         ht1 = HT,
         ht2 = ACTUALHT,
         crown_ratio = CR,
         top = if_else(HT > ACTUALHT, "N", "Y"),
         cull = CULL,
         CN = as.character(CN),
         PLT_CN = as.character(PLT_CN),
         total_wood_fia = DRYBIO_STEM*0.45359,
         total_bark_fia = DRYBIO_STEM_BARK*0.45359,
         total_branch_fia = DRYBIO_BRANCH*0.45359,
         merch_wood_fia = DRYBIO_BOLE*0.45359,
         merch_bark_fia = DRYBIO_BOLE_BARK*0.45359,
         stump_wood_fia = DRYBIO_STUMP*0.45359,
         stump_bark_fia = DRYBIO_STUMP_BARK*0.45359,
         foliage_fia = DRYBIO_FOLIAGE*0.45359) %>%
  select(CN, PLT_CN,
         site, plot, exp_factor, status, decay_class, species, 
         dbh, ht1, ht2, crown_ratio, top, cull,
         total_wood_fia, total_bark_fia, total_branch_fia,
         merch_wood_fia, merch_bark_fia,
         stump_wood_fia, stump_bark_fia, foliage_fia) %>%
  drop_na(status, species, dbh, ht1, ht2, crown_ratio, total_wood_fia, total_bark_fia, total_branch_fia, foliage_fia) %>%
  filter(!(status == "2" & is.na(decay_class)))

head(ca_tree_filter)
```
